entry.title: Pseudoregalia v0.10.2
entry.content:
**IMPORTANT: This release requires a fresh install, even if you have a previous version of the mod installed.**
APWorld changes: * Wrote out docs for web host. * Added expert clause: entering tower with Slide and one Cling Shard.
Client changes: * Updated the UE4SS dependency.
For releases between 0.7.2 and this one, [click here](https://github.com/qwint/pseudoregalia-archipelago/releases).

entry.title: ToeJam and Earl v0.5.2
entry.content:
## Big changes
- New toggleable option: `flat_promotions`, which makes Promotions award a large number of points instead of bumping you up to the next rank. The exact number depends on rank scaling. - New toggleable option: `auto_flat_promotions`, which makes flat Promotions received from other worlds open automatically
## Other changes
- Presentsanity is now 100% Mystery Presents: it no longer adds extra Promotion presents to the pool, and the starting inventory is now forced to be Mystery Presents - Added aliases for various options for convenience (e.g. "vanilla" and "base" are now interchangeable in option names, amongst other things) - Small adjustments to the timing of the custom text for map reveals/elevator keys to reduce the chance of missing it
## Bugfixes
- Fixed a logic bug that caused Jackpot and Extra Buck presents to be considered permanently collected

entry.title: Minecraft v2.0.0
entry.content:
### What's Changed
- [mod] Fixed Dragon Egg Shards not being received - [apworld] Fixed client UI not opening

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.2
### Client Changes - Added a config option to automatically open the connection window on game launch. - Fix an occasional crash when receiving an item while in the Song Library (*hopefully*).
### YAML Creator Changes - Added a new **YAML Settings** tab for additional options, including Progression Balancing and Accessibility. - Added a `worst case` value to seed stats. Shows the maximum possible playtime for each pool assuming the longest songs are selected. - Added new options to help trim large song lists to stay under the recommended limits: - `Remove Unplaceable Songs` removes songs that don’t fit into any pool. - `Pregenerate Selected Setlist` chooses the smallest random subset of songs needed to generate a seed with your settings. - If enabled, you must generate a new YAML for each seed or you will reuse the same setlist every time. - **Highly recommended for large multiworlds.** - It is not recommended to manually edit the YAML after export if either of these options is enabled. - Fix DeathLink and EnergyLink settings not loading from cache.
Tested against [YARG nightly b3564](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3564) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This version is compatible with V2.5.0
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v18.0.0
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v18.0.1
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: PEAK v0.5.9rc1
entry.content:
## v0.5.9-rc.1
  • Items being locked and randomized spawns is now an option in the yaml called ItemSanity
  • Experimental BreathLink Support: Complete loss of Stamina linked to other BreathLinked games
  • Trap Queue system to reduce trap spam
  • Connection UI moved into pause menu under Archipelago button
  • Archipelago Settings in game now includes toggling DeathLink, TrapLink, RingLink/HardRingLink, BreathLink on the fly
  • Small handful of new traps
  • Milk & Idol invincibility fixed
  • Some badge logic fixed
  • Potential fix for Basketball checks
  • In Game Items as Items severely reduced to reduce potential crashing. Instead there's a handful of filler items so not every item can be sent to you.
### Notes High Altitude Badge is currently disabled as a check until further notice

entry.title: Rain World v1.5.1
entry.content:
# See [the setup page](https://github.com/alphappy/ArchipelagoRW/blob/v1.5.0/worlds/rain_world/docs/setup_en.md) for instructions. # This release is intended to be used with [v1.5.3 of the client](https://github.com/SaltiestSyrup/RWRandomizer/releases/tag/v1.5.3). # Scroll down to Assets to find the player YAML templates and the .apworld.
## Player YAML Settings - Added Pearl, Gooieduck, and Beehive filler items (4f4973a4d26d38b27a127e636ff172db3e947d8f) - Added Responsibility, Ripple Spawn, and Blizzard Lizard trap items (b776627c7813dba3962b9e7ea4d40e1766fde2e1)
## Logic Changes / Fixes - Pomegranates are now considered a valid vegetarian food for Monk access calculations (33b49113c732e1a9b9b1a3962d5d80f5928c580e) - The Scholar passage will now check for access to three regions containing pearls (2edfe48f82f4d4dc605b881142e6df4f66f35f80) - It is now considered possible to travel backwards from Survivor spawn to Outskirts filtration as Saint or with any explosive jump (63ab7d25255456b3a8f7c4e3544f7371a5bef76b) - The flower in WSKD_B40 now requires some vertical mobility to be in logic (1c8533c09239bd443039a6c6f4a9731c12bea146) - Bitter Aerie checks will now generate for Saint (2a90d7f61ce9039b927338053c0b34643c2eaad6) - Inv is now considered able to achieve the Mother passage (35efd0994d5f89c5b15ac6f1197ca55531955f5e)
## Generation Fixes - Fix inaccuracies in logic determining which regions are valid starts (bc81c9ceaeca2a4589d114e11036b6b4f1931003) - Fix area above LttM being in logic for Rivulet when Submerged Superstructure is disabled (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Survivor and Monk no longer expected to complete "Red Centipede / Aquapede" food quest when Submerged Superstructure is disabled, as the only normal spawn in these campaigns is the aquapede near the gate (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Watcher is no longer expected to complete "Red Centipede / Aquapede" food quest when rotted region checks are disabled, as the only normal spawn is in Infested Wastes (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Phony warp checks in Ancient Urban removed, added a Spinning Top location in their place (b418a9371cc64b2cabbeb1977fdebb5637861229) - `passage_priority` option was previously completely non-functional, it now works as described (6865adabef347570ebeba7d0d0aa779e67156b0d) - Saint's non-existing "Exterior to Shoreline" gate has had the item removed (2a90d7f61ce9039b927338053c0b34643c2eaad6)
## Technical Fixes - Event locations are now sorted before being added to pool, to pass determinism tests (4fd13362b77f94be4b3a0e0397e29c44bbef6d6a)

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Additions - Universal Tracker now yamlless (thanks to James) - Icons now on the individual maps to indicate completed checks of and within maps - Clicking Chapter titles now sends you to the latest incomplete map in the chapter - Added automated testing for future development ease
## Bug Fixes - UT now working - Menu generation for empty chapters now works as intended
## Note You must use the latest (v0.6.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.6.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.6.6.post2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.6.6 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
# Changes - Fixed the text client printing empty lines - Fixed a misspelling in `Moodlesanity - Stimulated` [APWorld Change] - Deathlink messages now add punctuation to the cause if it didn't come with it already - Changed the Depression Trap to say "Mood" instead of "Happiness" - Disfigured Trap is now more violent - Moved some item IDs around [APWorld Change] - Added fillers for each of the crystal shards [APWorld Change] - The APWorld will now fail early if there are more progression items than locations, instead of cascading to a generation fail [APWorld Change] - The APWorld now requires Archipelago 0.6.6 [APWorld Change]
# Known Issues Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle Recipes may sometimes wipe themselves upon reconnection. Getting another recipe item triggers a failsafe that should fix this Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.6.5...v0.6.6

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.2.3
entry.content:
Hotfix 3
- Improve AP item processing speed by up to 10x - Fix location notifications showing more than once - Fix player data not being properly restored when loading a checkpoint - Fix universal player data polluting different AP seeds when changing seed without restarting the game first
Unless anything major comes up, this will be the last hotfix until another map is added.

entry.title: Peggle Deluxe v1.1.2
entry.content:
This is a minor bugfix / improvement release that is likely to be the _final release_ for this game. I do not intend to work on it further.
**This release is NOT compatible with games generated on prior versions since item / location names have been altered**
**Fix:** Removed square bracket notation in item / location names referring to levels. While square brackets are not disallowed for these names, a handful of other Archipelago implementations do not handle them correctly, all the way to fully crashing / not working at all. Let's aim for maximum compatibility even if Peggle isn't in the wrong here.
**WARNING: This change will INVALIDATE any existing YAML as the `level_selection` option used to contain those square brackets. You can either remove the square brackets manually or copy / paste the option from the new template YAML and set the values according to your preferences**
**Tweak:** `Target Score (High)` can now be sent out-of-logic (i.e. without having 4 Progressive Fever Meter items)
**Link to the previous release:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/releases/tag/peggle-deluxe-v1.1.1) **Link to the original release, with README:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/releases/tag/peggle-deluxe-v1.0.0)

entry.title: Peggle Nights v1.0.2
entry.content:
This is a minor bugfix / improvement release that is likely to be the _final release_ for this game. I do not intend to work on it further.
**This release is NOT compatible with games generated on prior versions since item / location names have been altered**
**Fix:** Removed square bracket notation in item / location names referring to levels. While square brackets are not disallowed for these names, a handful of other Archipelago implementations do not handle them correctly, all the way to fully crashing / not working at all. Let's aim for maximum compatibility even if Peggle isn't in the wrong here.
**WARNING: This change will INVALIDATE any existing YAML as the `level_selection` option used to contain those square brackets. You can either remove the square brackets manually or copy / paste the option from the new template YAML and set the values according to your preferences**
**Tweak:** `Target Score (High)` can now be sent out-of-logic (i.e. without having 4 Progressive Fever Meter items)
**Link to the previous release:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/releases/tag/peggle-nights-v1.0.1) **Link to the original release, with README:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/releases/tag/peggle-nights-v1.0.0)

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5
entry.content:
## What's New? - Blueprint Check Pedestals are now in the game! Three pedestals spawn on the street outside your restaurant, each showing a check you can buy for a set price. The price and number of checks available are fully configurable in your YAML. - Item scouting is now done on connect, so each pedestal shows the actual name of the item it'll send, including the player it belongs to if it's for someone else in the multiworld. - Improved error messaging when your YAML settings result in too few locations for the item pool. - Default option values have been adjusted to better suit the integration out of the box.
## New YAML Options **`blueprint_check_count`** — How many blueprint checks to add to the pool. Each one spawns a purchasable pedestal check over the course of your run.
**`blueprint_base_price`** — The starting price for buying a blueprint check.
**`blueprint_price_increase`** — How much the price goes up after each blueprint check is purchased.
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 0.2.6.0](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/)

entry.title: ToeJam and Earl v0.5.3
entry.content:
## Small changes
- Item links are now supported - Promotion logic has been simplified and now assumes the player will use every Promotion present in an "average" way. This greatly reduces generation failures while minimally affecting actual games. - Promotions are now twice as common if `flat_promotions` is enabled, to reflect their reduced point value - Extra Promotion presents are now only added to the item pool in the minimum quantity required to reach all rank checks - Balanced map exploration point assumptions based on Fixed World
## Bugfixes
- Fixed several overflow errors caused by having flat promotions in worlds with extremely low/high `max_level` and/or `max_rank_check` - Fixed division by zero error when rank checks were disabled with certain combinations of options - Removed nonexistent and unused "Level 1 Mailbox" locations from location groups - Actually fixed the error in logic which caused buck and point items to stay collected forever - Fixed a bug in multiworlds with multiple TJ&E instances that could cause Unfall presents to appear less frequently than they should - Various bits of AP testing compliance

entry.title: plateup v0.2.6.1.post2
entry.content:
## What's New? - `trap_cards` has been removed — set `trap_chance` to 0 to disable traps instead - Dish-specific day leases are here — each dish now has its own lease items that only gate progress on that dish specifically, leaving other dishes freely accessible - When using dish-specific leases with the franchise or complete days goals, overflow days beyond what dish leases cover are gated by a new Overtime Day Lease item - Added `dish_lease_scope` for the reach day with dishes goal — choose whether all selected dishes are lease-gated, or only the first few needed to hit your dish goal. With this goal and dish-specific mode, no generic leases are generated at all - Blueprint and setting checks now generate correctly for all goals, not just the first two - "Lose a Run" is now a valid check for franchise and complete days goals - Fixed a bug where goal state could bleed between games and cause generation failures - Fixed IDs being mismatched
## New YAML Options **`day_lease_mode`** — Controls how Day Lease items are organised. `global` uses a single shared lease item that gates all day-based content as before. `dish_specific` gives each dish its own named lease items (e.g. Steak Day Lease) that only gate that dish's days — requires dish count to be greater than 0.
**`dish_lease_scope`** — When using dish-specific leases with the reach day with dishes goal, controls which dishes get lease items. `all_dishes` gates every selected dish. `goal_count_only` only gates the first dish_goal_count dishes, leaving the rest freely accessible. Only relevant when day_lease_mode is dish_specific.
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 0.2.6.1](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.6.1)

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.0
entry.content:
- [ApWorld] Rewrote apworld to be autogenerated - [ApWorld] Added Support for Balatro DLC - [ApWorld] Improved logic - [Client] Updated from MelonLoader 7.1 to 7.2 - [Client] Updated to work with versions of VS after Balatro update - Downpatching is no longer needed/required - [Client] Cleaned up alot of code - [Client] Server timeout increased to 1min
### IF YOU PREVIOUSLY INSTALLED THE MOD YOU WILL NEED TO INSTALL IT DIFFERENTLY AND MAKE SURE TO UPDATE MELON LOADER TO 7.2
## not backwards compatible with prev. apworld versions

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.0
entry.content:
# Notice Keep in mind that this is a beta release and is not currently ready for a full release. Do not bring this into serious groups unless you know what you are doing. This is for testing purposes only to ensure everything is ready when this update gets a full release. Report bugs and check certain things to make sure everything works as intended.
# Changes - Submarine World are now able to be added to exclude_environments - As a result, Marine Mobile will now be start inventoried if you exclude the region. - Revert visitsanity location behavior to no longer check for cutscene address - Ingame checker slightly reworked to check for recently found addresses for more accuracy to check if in game - City Hall no longer sends/receives deathlink due to finding the ability to softlock the area
# Bugfixes - Music rando now fixed, as bizhawk does not have an "exit_event" code like CommonClient does. - Heart of Stones check for a new address. This should no longer have a chance to not send locations. - Fixed Scout Clothes from giving you the mission item if you only exclude either North Shore or Mayor's Villa.

entry.title: Jak II v0.1.0
entry.content:
TRAPS ARE FINALLY HERE!! enjoy fellas :)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/narramoment/Archipelago/compare/0.0.7...0.1.0

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v65
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.1
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.1
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.1.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.1
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.24
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Tweaked `Prevent rare encounters` to prevent accidentally merging everything to a single species - Fixed the current season (if randomized) always being set to the starting season upon reconnecting
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.24 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.25
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed incorrect logic for getting access to the roamer - Fixed unit test failures on GitHub due to the `ndspy` library missing (next try) - Tweaked the option description for the `Stats leniency` parameter - Fixed the seen count locations not accounting for the `All Pokémon Seen` option - Made HM moves forgettable without the move deleter - Tweaked the `dump_patched_files` part of the patching process
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.25 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.13
entry.content:
+ Display message when connection failed (wrong ip/port/username) + Display AP world mismatch (yellow text) when the version is different
+ Valhalla Breath West region logic fix + added some additional text to tutorial room

entry.title: Hunie Pop v2.2.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld/Client) added option/logic for deathlink - (APWorld) changed goal option to have each goal as text instead of a bool - (APWorld) changed girl gift randomisation option to allow for balanced randomised gifts - (APWorld) options that configure shop/hunie item costs now allow you to randomise a single value for all items or a randomised value for each item - (Client) changed girl "loves/likes/unique gift type" options on the girl preferences screen to "see collection" - (Client) changed Traits store tab to show lv's instead of prices since you cant buy them - (PopTracker) updated PopTracker with working logic -----HOTFIX----- - fix getting players own deathlinks

CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop Installed - Download Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop.exe" is if it asks you to overwrite files click yes - NOTE if you get a game crash when starting the game make sure that in "{huniepop game directory}/BepInEx/config/BepInEx.cfg" the 2nd last option is "type = MonoBehaviour" not "type = Application" APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy "Hunie Pop Archipelago poptracker.zip" to your poptracker "packs" folder

entry.title: PEAK v0.5.9rc2
entry.content:
## v0.5.9.rc-3 **Not compatible with previously generated worlds**
  • Items being locked now an option in the yaml called ItemSanity
  • Item Spawn randomization is now an option called LootSanity
  • Experimental BreathLink Support: Complete loss of Stamina linked to other BreathLinked games
  • Trap Queue system to reduce trap spam
  • Connection UI moved into pause menu under Archipelago button
  • Archipelago Settings in game now includes toggling DeathLink, TrapLink, RingLink/HardRingLink, BreathLink on the fly
  • Small handful of new traps
  • Milk & Idol invincibility fixed
  • Some badge logic fixed
  • Potential fix for Basketball checks
  • In Game Items as Items severely reduced to reduce potential crashing. Instead theres a handful of filler items so not every item can be sent to you.
  • Potential band aid to reload stamina upgrades on run start
  • Logic overhaul to account for ItemSanity and LootSanity
  • Happy Camper Badge added to multiplayer badge list so you can disable it
  • In Game Item tracker in the Archipelago section in the ESC/Pause menu
  • Item Unlocks able to be hinted in the tracker
  • Potential fixes for multiplayer issues with RingLink & EnergyLink
  • DeathLink Checkpoint will now check for a Checkpoint Flag first before falling back to the campfire
  • Scorchberry check and item unlock added
  • Progressive Mountain wasn't syncing on receive, just on player joining, should be fixed
  • Parasol check and unlock now considers both variants
### Notes High Altitude Badge is currently disabled as a check until further notice

entry.title: Diddy Kong Racing v1.1.4
entry.content: ### Fixed - Multiple fixes for generation (done by https://github.com/Eijebong) - Lua no longer breaks on the BizHawk dev build (issue found and diagnosed by WonderJ) - Getting more than 8 regional balloons will no longer break the associated boss race (issue found and diagnosed by Hedonic)

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.0.5
entry.content: Bugfix: - Cat's first quest had a logic error (didn't require male when it does)

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.0
entry.content:
[Utilizing the amazing in progress decompilation by akatsuki105](https://github.com/mmzret/rmz3), I was able to completely rewrite the back-end for this project, which should ease any issues regarding desyncs or locations unlocking when they shouldn't.
# Changes - Back-end has been rewritten. Should be more stable and less prone to desyncs, especially when using save states. - All 180 disks are now supported, previously only disks found in levels themselves were counted as AP items and locations. - NPC dialogue disks are no longer missable. Talking to an NPC any time after their dialogue changes should give all previous disks that you missed out on. - You will now be alerted in game when an Archipelago item is collected. It will display as a message box at the bottom of the screen. This feature is optional, as of right now it is very slow and distracting. I will be improving this later, but the choice is there now if you want it. (or just have text client open).
# Known Bugs - Certain rewards given by NPCs require you to make the correct dialogue choices. Right now these are broken, and you will always receive the disk regardless of what you say. This will be fixed later. - There's a chance that I may have missed out on a few dialogue related rewards. If there are any issues please ping me in the discord!

entry.title: evolve v0.1.0
entry.content:
### Evolve Incremental v0.1.0
The first official release of the [Evolve Client](https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve/) and [APWorld](https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld) is exist!
View the [Info](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/blob/main/evolve/docs/en_Evolve.md), [Setup](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/blob/main/evolve/docs/setup_en.md) or the main [Github](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld) pages for more information!
Please, please report any bugs to the APWorld Github Page!
## What's New? - First Official Release! - Future **Release Notes** will include an actuall changelog. - This one doesn't need one because you can go to the Info Page to see what changed since not existing.
## What will *probably* happend next? - Certain Tech Tree Unlocks will be Items. - Oil Derrick - Mad Science - Mutual Destruction - more that i cant remember - Make Death Link work... - whatever yall suggest! (if its reasonable)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/commits/v0.1.0

entry.title: BKSimulator v0.1.2
entry.content: - New option (YAML and in-game): Death Link Groups! - With Death Link on, only receive deaths from others in the same group. (BK Simulator still never sends DeathLinks) - APWorld rewritten to make use of Rule Builder. Logic should be unchanged.

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.5.2
entry.content:
# Version 0.5.2 Hotfix to change the way lock_prereqs option works
## Features, Improvements, and Changes * Removed any effect on logic by lock_prereqs toggle, it just allows for out of logic locations to be reached when disabled (thank you @NonIdiot)

entry.title: evolve v0.1.4
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.1.4
[client](<https://github.com/the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)
### Do I need to redownload the APWorld?
Nope!
## APWorld - Changed simple file stuff, this shouldn't have any effect! - v0.1.3 - Added a template yaml... - v0.1.4
## Client - Added links to the Setup and Info pages at the bottom! - v0.1.1 - Fixed it so that you can't just buy an infinite amount of the AP buildings... - v0.1.2 - Changed simple file stuff, this shouldn't have any effect! - v0.1.3

entry.title: Age Of Empires II: Definitive Edition v0.0.1
entry.content:
## What's Changed - Roman Camps no longer in logic before starting base on Attila 1 and 2. - Scythian Palisades removed after resolving Bleda storyline. - Fixed set_user_folder. - Messages are now resent if messages.xsdat is missing.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dmwever/Ageipelago/compare/0.1.1...0.1.2

entry.title: Resident Evil 3 Remake v0.2.7.5
entry.content:
**Quick and dirty release for testing purposes, please report anything to the RE3R thread in Discord.**
**RE2Randomizer features ported over:** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Enemy kills are now checks/locations, and they work on every difficulty.
Double Weapons / Local Weapons
In-game GUI tooltips when paused/in menu <- Note: Non-RTX only
A more revamped GUI system overall <- Mod menu is a lot more pleasant to look at
The newer "Safe" function, which previously didn't clear the safes off the map when checked now behaves closer to RE2 (the map will clear but the item icon still shows even though it doesn't exist)
**RE3Randomizer specific changes** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Added "Enemy Behavior"**, which will allow zombies/Nemesis to chase you to the ends of the earth
[SHOCKEEEEEEEEEEERRRRRR](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sMk-HPBF6Mw) - this embodies what will be happening (you're Shocker in this case btw)
**Fixed a major bug with the Lock Pick/Battery Pack** Thanks to everyone who reported this. Previously, if you received the Lock Pick and then saved/quit/died before seeing the Lock Pick cutscene, it could disappear from your inventory. Coincidentally while testing the fix for the Lock Pick I discovered the Battery Pack does the same thing If the game detects that it's missing, it will put a new copy into your ItemBox.
**Jewels and the STARS ID Card are now always local**, these are also required before each area transition where the game would normally stop requiring them **(this prevents players from accidentally disposing of them too early and missing locations later on)**
**And a bunch of smaller bug fixes, including:**
Locker 109 no longer being static due to an item_object issue
Supply Case now correctly giving Flame Rounds instead of Acid Rounds
Locations not sending first time around, sometimes (this didn't occur for most of us, please report back if it happens to you)
Again, if you're playing on RTX, the fancy new paused/menu GUI features are not available. Those currently only work for non-RTX users.
## What Fuzzy fixed for us behind the scenes because he's goated * Remove likely cause of ImGUI error in recent REF versions by @FuzzyGamesOn in https://github.com/TheRealSolidusSnake/RE3R_AP_Client/pull/7
## What others contributed @RopeyRed - Enemy Kills on all difficulties @Grenier - Strip Scenario/Character out of the client/apworld so it no longer appends (JA) to each location for no reason, now we only append difficulty if not a "Standard" location.

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.6.2
entry.content:
- Fixes a problem where the level unlock key graphic could appear oversized. - Level clears and unlocks now display instantly again. - Custom graphics are now pre-loaded to prevent a lag spike when a check item appears. - Plant stat randomisation has been rebalanced based on feedback and my own experiences. Let me know how you get on with it! - Rewritten APWorld logic, especially where plant stat randomisation is involved. The randomised stats of plants will be more closely considered when creating logic, with plants even gaining or losing the progression classification based on their effectiveness and affordability. - Changes to how randomised conveyors are generated. This should hopefully make conveyor levels more balanced and less RNG-reliant... emphasis on the "hopefully", there. - Fixes to various generation errors.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: BKSimulator v0.1.2
entry.content: - Disconnection from server will now properly kick you back to the main menu, preventing time being wasted on progress that isn't actually being saved. - The message queue is now cleared on disconnection, so messages are no longer leftover from previous connections.

entry.title: Minecraft v2.1.3
entry.content:
### What's Changed
- [mod] Crafters now abide by locked recipes - [mod] Re-added lore to Ender Pearl and Wither Skeleton Skull items to communicate goal requirements - [apworld] Improved handling of invalid apmc files

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.4.3
entry.content: - Fixed incorrect logic for 1-1: Secret Exit. (again) - Fixed incorrect logic for Boss: Mirror Reaper. [@gerbiljames] #42 - Fixed a generation failure during accessibility checks when all levels that an enemy can appear in are skipped. [@gerbiljames] #42 - Fixed a generation failure if the goal level has a secret exit and too many levels are skipped. [@gerbiljames] #42 - Fixed a bug where secret missions would still logically require access to the levels you would normally enter them from, when unlocked by finding items instead of using secret exits.

entry.title: Autopelago v0.11.0
entry.content:
# https://autopelago.app
The game client has been completely rewritten from scratch. It runs in the browser now.
The .apworld now has a manifest, but has otherwise not changed since 0.10.3.
# Changes since 0.11.12 1. Fix an oversight where a horizontal scroll bar could appear under normal conditions just because of how close certain locations are to the edge.
Everything from the original native version *should* be present in this one. If not, then that's a bug. Please report it.
# Other changes since 0.10.4
1. You no longer need to run any native executable files. It's a web app now, so just go to that URL. - If you want to self-host it, it's all static files - this release should have a "dist.zip" asset that you can just drop into any reasonable static web server. - You will **need** to self-host if you want it to work with an Archipelago server that doesn't use HTTPS. 2. You can now launch directly to the game if you know all the magical things to type into the URL fragment. This is mostly provided so you can refresh the page without having to click through the menu again. 3. As is web tradition, most errors that happen when the game is running will not automatically take you out of the game screen. Instead, they will just create banners along the top that you have to click to dismiss. Hopefully, this will never happen to you (of course, it happened to me constantly while developing this). 4. Not only is this a web app (and so it finally runs on Mac and Android), but it's a **progressive** web app. This means that you can "install" it as a native app on Android, even. 5. Interval between "when STILL blocked" messages is now configurable (though it's still got a minimum of 15 minutes so that you don't spam everyone). 6. There's now a separate "Connecting..." screen between the settings page and the main game screen, instead of showing a version of the game screen instantly and then modifying it once you're finally connected. 7. When you get disconnected for any reason (other than clicking the button to go back to the menu), you now get spat back to the same "Connecting..." screen (with a different message) and it will try to reconnect you automatically, at least once every 30 seconds. 8. The game version is now visible in the title bar and on the game screen. This is more relevant here because browsers like to cache way too much stuff. 9. Somewhat redesigned the layout of the game screen to be a bit clearer. Instead of shorthand "RAT" / "NOM" / etc., we have a "RATS: ##" expander, and then all the active buffs / debuffs are visible with their full names under it. This takes up a lot of screen space, so you can collapse it to just show the rat count. 10. The left panel can also shrink MUCH more than before. 11. The position of the grid separator is now saved between runs. 12. If your slot has an alias, we now show that (without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always just showing the official slot name. 13. Chat commands can now be addressed to the rat's alias (with or without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always having to be its slot name, provided that nobody else in the room has picked the same alias. 14. Added a simple chat tab to just send / receive messages in the room, so that you don't HAVE to flip back and forth. It's not quite as fancy as the standard text client, but it should be good enough. 15. Elements that you can interact with all support tab-focusing, and the tooltips as well. 16. When a lot of things happen all at once that the game hasn't animated yet, the app will try to play back everything that happened. This was important when moving to a web app, because browsers don't render things when the tab is in the background or minimized, so when you come back, a LOT of things could have changed. In fact, when LOTS of things changed, it speeds up the playback up to 5x so that you can "catch up" to the current state more quickly. 17. When clicking on an item in the panel to request a hint, the confirmation box now shows up right next to it instead of in the middle of the screen. 18. The "u win." screen now just covers a *part* of the map instead of taking you all the way out. 19. Fix an oversight where the self-host bundle was still expecting to run on `https://autopelago.app` 20. Add a discriminator to the beginning of the title for the benefit of those with multiple tabs 21. #129: Bring back the ability to show the path to the target by clicking on the rat. 22. Fix a minor issue where the rat would face its ultimate target instead of the next location along the route to it. 23. Fix an issue where the rat would go to the nearest user-requested location instead of going in order of when they were requested. 24. (After the failed v0.11.2) probably fix a calculation error in the "show path" calculation? 25. #130: Bring back the ability to personalize your rat. 26. Replace Pixi.js with native elements, which should unblock those getting the error "`CanvasRenderer` is not yet implemented". This also probably brings with it a mixed bag of performance penalties and performance improvements. 27. Fix several ways in which the page could look self-inconsistent while the rat is still catching up to where the server is. 28. Correct the size of the "Personalize Your Rat!" button on the main page for non-Firefox browsers. 29. Remove a brief flicker of the "Personalize Your Rat!" window's header text. It might still sometimes shift, but generally shouldn't have any frames where the text goes outside the window like it did. 30. Add tooltips for the filler squares to show their names, exactly the same as tooltips for landmarks. 31. Add information about known hints onto these tooltips. 32. Move some quest markers out of the way so that they no longer overlap filler squares. 33. Shrink landmark images so that they don't crowd their filler squares. 34. Extra-shrink the hitboxes around the quest markers to make their nearby filler squares easier to get to. 35. Add the ability to "hyper-focus" a location by clicking on it (or pressing Enter on it if you are tabbing through with your keyboard). This "hyper-focus" can only be adjusted by interacting with it in the browser (no chat commands supported, by design) for multiple reasons. 36. #134: Fix an issue where the rat's focused location(s) would get cleared — even if the location wasn't checked — if it happened to land on the location without any actions remaining to make an attempt at checking it. 37. Fix an oversight from 0.11.5 where the animation checkboxes did nothing. - In addition to restoring the original few things that these checkboxes control: 1. Transitions on Food/Energy/Luck bars will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 2. Tile examples in the tooltips and the "u win." dialog will be animated (or not) along with the tiles, synchronized to the same frame. 3. The dashed line showing the path from the rat to its target location will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 4. The rat token will animate its movement from one location to the next (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 5. On systems where the user has indicated a [preference for "reduced motion"](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/At-rules/@media/prefers-reduced-motion#user_preferences), the two checkboxes will be unchecked by default. 38. #143: Stop automatically reconnecting after getting disconnected. This has been resurrecting rooms that had previously timed out, which is rude. Some version of this MAY come back in the future, if I can find a way to detect when it would be OK. 39. #142: The dashed path to the rat's current target will no longer get misaligned and shrunk on games that don't go all the way to Snakes on a Planet. 40. #138: The sidebar now has an extra spot at the beginning that shows the number of all rats. This lets you do the same stuff that the other icons in this panel let you do: click to hint for any rat (i.e., any item in the "Rats" item group) and hover over it to see a tooltip with all the hinted rat locations. 41. Because I kept getting annoyed while testing the previous one, tooltips now stay around when the cursor goes inside them instead of needing the cursor to stay inside the original trigger box. This means that you can now highlight text from these tooltips with your mouse and copy-paste. 42. I might have fixed a bug where sometimes the rat wouldn't send its chat messages immediately, but would wait for some arbitrary event to happen in the future. I have no idea why I wrote it the way I did at first... 43. Whenever we see `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` in any message from your YAML file, we'll replace that with the current alias of a random player. I tried to make this as useful and sensible as I could: - If you are the only player (on your team), it will always just pick you. Otherwise, it will never pick you, but instead: - If any other players (on your team) are connected and haven't completed their goal yet, then it will pick a random one of them. Otherwise, it will pick a random other player (on your team). - If there are multiple `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` placeholders in a single message, then we'll try to pick as many **different** players as possible (in random order still), only repeating a player if there are more placeholders than the number of players allowed by the above rules. To be precise, we sample randomly without replacement from the list until the list is empty, then we refill it and repeat the process until all placeholders have been filled. 44. Fix an oversight that caused messages to get repeatedly processed over and over again. This was most visible when telling the rat to do something: it would go into an infinite loop of acknowledging the request forever.

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.6.3
entry.content:
- Fixes a freeze that could occur when playing Bobsled Bonanza, Pogo Party or Air Raid where randomisation resulted in these levels using Trash Can zombie. - Fixes an issue where you had to exit and re-enter the selection screen after unlocking a new level in order for it to display correctly. - Universal Tracker improvements for zombie and plant stat randomisation.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: Cobalt Core v1.1.6
entry.content:
- Made memory counts / Timeline fix counts clearer when memories are shuffled - Cards and artifacts from other instances of Cobalt Core in the multiworld now show a detailed tooltip - The game no longer tracks Steam achievements while the mod is installed - Locked cards are now properly darkened while in hand - Locked cards are no longer darkened in tooltips - Tweaked some color values in the tracker and console for readability - Fixed desynchronization between client and host when locations are sent from the server (such as with `send_location` for example) - Fixed an issue preventing some characters from being chosen at the end of a run when memories are shuffled - Fixed a crash when players or items in the multiworld had curly braces in their name
The YAML and APWorld are identical to version 1.1.5, and this version is compatible with currently running 1.1.5 multiworlds.
I said I wouldn't come back before 1.2.0, but I wanted to tackle some easy to fix annoying bugs first. I have a lot on my plate at the moment so I don't know when I'll be starting work on 1.2.0, but it will happen!

entry.title: Slay the Spire v2.3.5
entry.content:
2.3.5 patch release of the StS APWorld. This AP world requires a 2.x release of the mod from https://github.com/cjmang/Slay-The-Spire-Archipelago-Mod/releases.
This game still exists?
## What's Changed * Fixed an issue with the combination of `pick_num_characters` and `advanced_characters` where having more than 5 modded characters in `advanced_characters` with officially supported characters would randomly cause gen failures.
For all AP releases you will need to install the spire.apworld file into your Archipelago installation's custom_worlds folder. You can find said apworld in the assets of this release.
For the setup guide, please go to https://github.com/cjmang/StS-AP-World/blob/sts/worlds/spire/docs/slay-the-spire_en.md.

entry.title: Void Stranger v0.9.2.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed General: Locusts are now obtained from chests just like vanilla Numbered Brane locust chests are now always AP Checks Max Locust Up's are included in the item pool and increase your maximum capacity for holding locusts Mon Bank now deals with Bonus Locusts, which are filler items not factored into logic
Generation: Locustsanity is now forced on Generation shouldn't fail, probably
Yaml: Removed Locustsanity option New setting "Max Locust Up Size" Greed Coin Amount range is now from 1-30
Bugfixes: Receiving multiple items in quick succession will no longer delete locusts, progressive brands, or greed coins Burdens are now properly received from AP
Misc: AP Items are now saved to file and should not reset upon game close or reconnecting to AP To properly reset between multiworlds, select End Run from the pause menu Fixed typo on room name of Floor 196

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.1
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Fixed Enemysanity always being enabled - [ApWorld] Fixed `allowunfaircharacters` host setting not being correctly named as `allow_unfair_characters` - [ApWorld] Removed a follower the snuck into the character list - [Client] Fixed some random shenanigans with not setting the correct EnemyType - [Client] Added compatibility layer for worlds made before v0.3 1. it will create a `Compatibility.txt` in `Mods/SW_CreeperKing.ArchipelagoSurvivors/Data` 2. inside it should have `incorrect name =` 3. just add the correct name after it 4. save 5. relaunch the game

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.2.0
entry.content:
0.2 is here!

While this release doesn't add any new areas to the game, it adds quite some features needed to expand to a healthy randomizer with all item locations included.

New features:

- **Story management & Timewarps**: Once you defeat the Slargummy boss, Panselo will turn into its post-abduction state. If you ever need to go back to pre-abduction Panselo to get some checks you've missed, You can talk to the Zophiel statue and temporarily go back in time. - **All items** that are needed to get you to the end of the game are now included in the item pool! That means all tools, upgraded tools and weapons. Even with the limited amount of checks, it makes for a more interesting randomizer experience. - **Complete logic overhaul**: Though less noticeable for you as a player, the entire logic model now includes all the possibly necessary items and on a technical level, it's way easier to expand to the entire game. - **Batless start**: You can now start the game without the wooden bat and have it randomized in the item pool. This includes an option to open the Panselo gates by default, which prevents you from possibly getting BKed early in a multiworld. - **Upgradable items**: Bats, tools and the spear now have separate options to be upgradable. This means that you will always find the Slingshot before the Treble shot. The Wooden bat always before the Composite bat. And for the spear, this means you will always find the Sonic spear before the Spear bomb. - **Options to exclude (almost) every possible check**: Locations for key items, heart rubies, energy gems and moonstones can now be excluded. If you do, you have a separate option to still include these items in the item pool and have these locations filled with a filler item (Excluded key item locations will always work like this), or to exclude the items from the item pool and have them stay at their vanilla location. For now, Anuri pearlstone locations can't be excluded yet due to a feature I wish to work on for the next release. - **Infinite Lunar Artifacts**: A change some might wish to be in vanilla. Lunar artifacts will no longer take up a spot in the inventory and can't be discarded. They can still be recycled for now, but once Astrid's rewards are included, this will also be disabled. - **Several new checks**: Most notably the checks in post-abduction Panselo. Also some checks I missed in the previous release and checks that couldn't be reached with the item pool of the previous release. Once again, the community will be my testing crew. If you encounter any issues during your run, please let me know through one of the following ways: 1. File an issue at the repository on [GitHub](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/issues). 2. Describe your issue in the game thread on the official AP discord. 3. Post it in the mwgg-support channel in the [Unofficial AP Discord](https://discord.multiworld.gg)

entry.title: evolve v0.2.6
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.2.6 [client]() | [apworld]() ### Do I need to redownload the APWold? Nope! ## APWorld - Nothing changed here! ## Client - Fixed being able to purchase infinite AP buildings... - v0.1.5 - Fixed usernames with spaces breaking - v0.1.6 - From now on if your username includes a space, wrap it in quotation marks (") when logging in! - Added Death Link! - v0.2.6


--- ## Death Link Overview #### Cause Death Link will trigger when: - Any amount of soldiers die - From being attacked or attacking - Any amount of citizens die - A spy is executed - A citizen dies in a brawl If multiple deaths happen at once, you attack and 7 soldiers die, Death Link will trigger once. #### Effect Death Link will: - Soldier Pop set to 0 - Citizen Pop set to 1 - Default Job and Citizen set to the job that supplies food. This is to ensure a death spiral doesn't happen where the game is trying to refill other jobs and no food is being produced and everyone dies.
